subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Dhikr
subcodes.first_line: This is the Súrih of Remembrance, sent down as a token of grace, that perchance the people of the Bayán might renounce that which they possess
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نقطه الاولی الی الذینهم آمنوا بالله الواحد الفرد العزیز العلیم و فیه یخاطب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
